document.source_title: RR vs LSG IPL 2026 LIVE Score: Josh Inglis for Lucknow Super Giants vs Rajasthan Royals in Jaipur
document.summary: Rishabh Pant's performance in IPL 2026 has been under scrutiny as he struggles with his batting form. Despite efforts to improve his fitness and technique, he continues to face challenges, exemplified by his recent dismissal for 15 runs while playing for the Lucknow Super Giants. This performance contributed to LSG's eighth defeat of the season, raising questions about Pant's captaincy and future in the team.
key_takeaways: Rishabh Pant's batting struggles continue in IPL 2026.
He was dismissed for 15 runs in a crucial match for LSG.
Pant's performance has led to LSG's eighth defeat of the season.
He has been working on his game with advice from Yuvraj Singh.
His captaincy is under scrutiny due to the team's poor performance.
Pant aims for a national comeback despite his current form.
document.why_it_matters: Rishabh Pant's struggles in IPL 2026 highlight the challenges faced by players under pressure to perform, especially in high-stakes environments like the IPL. His ability to bounce back is crucial not only for his career but also for the Lucknow Super Giants' performance and their aspirations in the tournament.
